description: Monica CRM API Reference - Complete endpoint documentation

activities.description: Activities made with one or more contacts

activityTypeCategories.description: Categories for activity types (e.g., Sport, Food, Cultural)

compliance.description: Terms of use and privacy policies

contactFieldTypes.description: Types of contact fields (Email, Phone, Facebook, etc.)

conversations.description: Conversations with contacts and their messages

in_debt.description: yes=user owes contact, no=contact owes user

journal.description: Personal journal entries (not linked to contacts)

notes: All endpoints require Bearer token authentication via MONICA_API_KEY
Pagination uses page/limit parameters with default per_page of 10-15 items
Delete responses return { deleted: true, id: number }
Date formats are YYYY-MM-DD for input, ISO 8601 for output
Special dates (birthdate, deceased_date, first_met_date) have special handling for age-based or year-unknown scenarios
Relationship types and relationship type groups are read-only
